skills.name: Jaguar Stance
skills.description: Wear a Jaguar mask and take a combative posture.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor %
[Jaguar Stance] buff effect
* Jaguar skill Final Damage + CaptionRatio %
Movement Speed + CaptionRatio2

skills.name: Wild Rush
skills.description: Rush toward the front and give damage to the enemies at the destination.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
Target: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Hunter’s Target
skills.effect_text:
[Hunter’s Target] debuff duration: CaptionTime seconds
[Hunter’s Target] skill factor per 1 second: SkillFactor %
Enemy's Movement Speed decreases by CaptionRatio when [Hunter’s Target: Snare] is activated

skills.name: Wild Howling
skills.description: Howl and give damage to the enemies nearby.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
Target: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Wild Thorn
skills.description: Give damage by swiftly throwing the dagger 3 times to the front.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
Target: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Wild Claw
skills.description: Give AoE damage by moving to the front in a spin while slashing the dagger.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor % x 6
Number of target CaptionRatio
Final Damage of skill +10% during Jaguar stance

skills.name: Wild Adaptability
skills.description: Damage received decreased for the duration.
skills.effect_text:
Decreases damage received by CaptionRatio %
Duration: CaptionTime second(s)

attributes.name: Jaguar Stance: Escape
attributes.description:
* Lifted from [Slow], [Immobility], [Arrest] effect when [Jaguar Stance] is cast

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Jaguar Stance: Wild Nature
attributes.description: * Damage dealt to the enemy increases by 5% and damage received from the enemy decreases by 15% when [Jaguar Stance] is activated

attributes.name: Hunter’s Target: Snare
attributes.description: * [Hunter’s Target] debuff decreases the Movement Speed of the target instead of giving continuous damage

attributes.name: Wild Howling: Craving
attributes.description: * The range of the [Wild Howling] decreases but applies [Slow] debuff to the target for 6 seconds

attributes.name: Wild Adaptability: Extreme
attributes.description:
* When receiving fatal damage while [Wild Adaptability] is activated, survive with 1 HP and become invincible for 3 seconds

* Cooldown changes to 7 minutes

attributes.name: Wild Adaptability: Tough
attributes.description:
* Immune to Knockback / Knockdown while [Wild Adaptability] is activated

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Hunter’s Target: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Hunter’s Target]'s continuous damage by 0.5% per attribute level. +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Wild Rush: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Wild Rush] by 0.5% per attribute level. +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Wild Howling: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Wild Howling] by 0.5% per attribute level. +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Wild Thorn: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Wild Thorn] by 0.5% per attribute level. +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Wild Claw: Enhance
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Wild Claw] by 0.5% per attribute level. +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Wild Rush: Sweep
attributes.description:
* Penetrate 5 enemies between the skill range when using [Wild Rush] and give damage equal to the skill damage.

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: [Arts] Wild Howling: Fear
attributes.description:
* Damage dealt by the enemy hit by [Wild Howling] decreases by 10% for 8 seconds

* Increases SP consumption by 30%

attributes.name: Wild Adaptability: Beyond
attributes.description:
* [Wild Adaptability] duration increases by 5 seconds

* Effect of [Wild Adaptability] decreases by 25%

attributes.name: [Arts] Hunter’s Target: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Hunter’s Target] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Wild Rush: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Wild Rush] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Wild Howling: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Wild Howling] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Wild Thorn: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Wild Thorn] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Wild Claw: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Wild Claw] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Jaguar Stance: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Jaguar Stance]'s basic attacks by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level
